title: polygala cornuta subsp. pollardii
intro: Polygala cornuta subsp. pollardii, also known as Pollard's Polygala, is a rare and endangered plant species belonging to the Polygalaceae family. It is a perennial herb that has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Polygala cornuta subsp. pollardii include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress and anxiety, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
